text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the product brief documented and stable?

branch.question: Is a human reviewer available to gate AC?

conclusion.verdict: draft spec via LLM with 3 gates
skip-this-methodology — wait for reviewer; do not auto-merge

example.trace: input matches `brief_status == stable` → sub-question → `reviewer_available == true` → conclusion ref=`human-gate-three`.
